subject: (no subject)
body: darren , I just spke to Ammerlin,, he says that we have no place to keep the barge,  you have taken over the transaction, and that it was supposed to be kept at the taxi dock.. why would I buy fishhook for 2m. when I can buy the taxi for 750.000, if that is the case.. PLease call him and get this straight,, Is this another amerlin f u. ,
